ingest_command: bcftools view --no-version dbsnp_b156.vcf.gz | bcftools annotate -x 'INFO/^FREQ,INFO/COMMON' | llmap variant-ingest --source dbsnp --bucket-bp 100 --min-af 0.0 --output dbsnp.priors
notes: Largest catalog; ingest with --min-af 0.001 to drop singletons unless you really need them. Common-only subset is ~10x smaller.
